
```{r}
source('R/packages.R')
source('R/functions.R')
source('R/functions-phase2.R')
source('R/tables-phase2.R')
source('R/tables.R')

```



```{r  load-data-50155}
my_site <- 50155
```


`r paste0('## Crossing ', my_site, ' - ', my_overview_info() %>% pull(road_name), ' - ', my_overview_info() %>% pull(stream_name))`


### Site Location

Crossing `r as.character(my_site)` is located on a `r my_pscis_info() %>% pull(stream_name)`, approximately 75m upstream from the confluence with Lizard Creek. The stream is located approximately 100m east of the location where it is mapped on the freshwater atlas stream layer.





```{r}
make_tab_summary(df = pscis2 %>% filter(pscis_crossing_id == my_site)) %>% 
  kable() %>% 
  kableExtra::add_footnote(label = paste0('Comments: ', pscis2 %>% filter(pscis_crossing_id == my_site) %>% pull(assessment_comment)), notation = 'none') %>% #this grabs the comments out
  kableExtra::add_footnote(label = paste0('Photos: ', 
                                          paste0('![](https://github.com/NewGraphEnvironment/', basename(getwd()), '/raw/master/data/photos/', my_site, '/crossing_all.JPG)')), notation = 'none')
```
